title: ALGM Earnings Calendar and Report Dates
text: Allegro MicroSystems maintains a comprehensive earnings calendar tracking quarterly results and earnings dates. The company reports earnings regularly each quarter, providing detailed financial performance metrics. Key earnings dates and future guidance are tracked through financial platforms including Nasdaq, Zacks, and investor relations websites. The company's historical earnings performance shows consistent beat-and-raise patterns in multiple quarters, demonstrating strong operational execution. Earnings surprises have been positive in recent quarters, with the company beating both EPS and revenue estimates. Management provides forward guidance on revenue, gross margins, and earnings per share for upcoming quarters. Quarterly results include GAAP and non-GAAP metrics, with non-GAAP earnings being particularly important for semiconductor companies. The company's earnings calls provide detailed commentary on market conditions, customer trends, and strategic initiatives. Design wins and backlog metrics are often highlighted during earnings calls as leading indicators of future growth.
